title: Kangaroo Level 1-2 - Counting Drill
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: How many stars are shown in the picture below?
questions.image_description: Five yellow stars in a row.
questions.solution: Count each star one by one: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5. There are 5 stars.

questions.question_text: How many circles are drawn in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='#e0f0ff' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='25' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='65' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='105' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='145' cy='30' r='12'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Four light blue circles in a row.
questions.solution: There are 4 circles drawn side by side.

questions.question_text: Which number is the largest?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='2'><text x='20' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>3</text><text x='70' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>8</text><text x='120' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>5</text><text x='170' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>2</text></svg>
questions.image_description: The numbers 3, 8, 5, and 2 are shown.
questions.solution: Among 3, 8, 5, 2 the largest is 8.

questions.question_text: How many triangles do you count in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='#e8ffe0' stroke-width='2'><polygon points='20,45 35,15 50,45'/><polygon points='60,45 75,15 90,45'/><polygon points='100,45 115,15 130,45'/><polygon points='140,45 155,15 170,45'/><polygon points='180,45 195,15 210,45'/><polygon points='215,45 225,25 235,45'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Six triangles in a row.
questions.solution: Counting each triangle: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. There are 6 triangles.

questions.question_text: Which number is the smallest?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='2'><text x='20' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>7</text><text x='70' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>4</text><text x='120' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>9</text><text x='170' y='38' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>1</text></svg>
questions.image_description: The numbers 7, 4, 9, and 1 are shown.
questions.solution: Among the displayed numbers 7, 4, 9, 1, the smallest is 1.

questions.question_text: Count the squares shown in the picture. How many are there?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='#fde0f0' stroke-width='2'><rect x='15' y='18' width='24' height='24'/><rect x='55' y='18' width='24' height='24'/><rect x='95' y='18' width='24' height='24'/><rect x='135' y='18' width='24' height='24'/><rect x='175' y='18' width='24' height='24'/><rect x='215' y='18' width='24' height='24'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Six pink squares arranged in a row.
questions.solution: Counting the squares gives 6.

questions.question_text: Lisa has these apples. How many apples does she have altogether?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='#ffd6d6' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='25' cy='32' r='10'/><circle cx='55' cy='32' r='10'/><circle cx='85' cy='32' r='10'/><circle cx='115' cy='32' r='10'/><circle cx='145' cy='32' r='10'/><circle cx='175' cy='32' r='10'/><circle cx='205' cy='32' r='10'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Seven red apple shapes in a row.
questions.solution: Count the apples one by one to get 7.

questions.question_text: What number comes right after 6 when you count up by ones?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='2'><text x='40' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>4</text><text x='80' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>5</text><text x='120' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>6</text><text x='160' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: The sequence 4, 5, 6, ? is shown.
questions.solution: Counting by ones after 6 gives 7.

questions.question_text: How many hearts are in the picture?
questions.image_description: Six heart shapes.
questions.solution: Counting each heart one by one gives 6 hearts in total.

questions.question_text: A boy counts by 2s starting at 2. What is the fourth number he says?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='2'><text x='25' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>2,</text><text x='75' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>4,</text><text x='125' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>6,</text><text x='175' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: The sequence 2, 4, 6, ? is shown.
questions.solution: Skip counting by 2s: 2, 4, 6, 8. The fourth number is 8.

questions.question_text: In the line of animals, which position from the left is the rabbit?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 70' stroke='currentColor' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='25' cy='40' r='14'/><text x='18' y='45' font-size='14' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>cat</text><circle cx='75' cy='40' r='14'/><text x='66' y='45' font-size='14' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>dog</text><circle cx='125' cy='40' r='14'/><text x='112' y='45' font-size='14' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>frog</text><circle cx='175' cy='40' r='14'/><text x='160' y='45' font-size='14' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>rabbit</text><circle cx='225' cy='40' r='14'/><text x='215' y='45' font-size='14' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>bird</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Row of animals: cat, dog, frog, rabbit, bird.
questions.solution: From the left: cat (1st), dog (2nd), frog (3rd), rabbit (4th).

questions.question_text: How many circles are black in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 60' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='25' cy='30' r='10' fill='#222'/><circle cx='60' cy='30' r='10' fill='#fff'/><circle cx='95' cy='30' r='10' fill='#222'/><circle cx='130' cy='30' r='10' fill='#fff'/><circle cx='165' cy='30' r='10' fill='#222'/><circle cx='200' cy='30' r='10' fill='#222'/><circle cx='235' cy='30' r='10' fill='#fff'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Row of 7 circles; some filled black, some white.
questions.solution: The black circles are at positions 1, 3, 5, 6 - four black circles total.

questions.question_text: A group of ducks stands in a pond. Which picture row shows MORE ducks than fish?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='#fff4b8' stroke-width='2'><text x='5' y='20' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>ducks:</text><circle cx='55' cy='18' r='6'/><circle cx='75' cy='18' r='6'/><circle cx='95' cy='18' r='6'/><circle cx='115' cy='18' r='6'/><circle cx='135' cy='18' r='6'/><text x='5' y='55' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>fish:</text><ellipse cx='55' cy='55' rx='8' ry='4' fill='#c8e0ff'/><ellipse cx='80' cy='55' rx='8' ry='4' fill='#c8e0ff'/><ellipse cx='105' cy='55' rx='8' ry='4' fill='#c8e0ff'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Top row has 5 ducks, bottom row has 3 fish.
questions.solution: There are 5 ducks and 3 fish. 5 - 3 = 2, so ducks are more by 2.

questions.question_text: Mia counts her marbles in groups of 5: 5, 10, 15, ... What comes next?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='2'><text x='30' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>5,</text><text x='80' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>10,</text><text x='140' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>15,</text><text x='210' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Skip count sequence 5, 10, 15, ? shown.
questions.solution: Skip counting by 5s gives 5, 10, 15, 20.

questions.question_text: How many leaves are shown if there are three bunches with 2, 3, and 4 leaves?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='#d0f0d0' stroke-width='2'><ellipse cx='25' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='45' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='95' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='115' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='135' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='185' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='205' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='225' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><ellipse cx='245' cy='30' rx='8' ry='4'/><text x='25' y='60' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>bunch 1</text><text x='95' y='60' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>bunch 2</text><text x='185' y='60' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>bunch 3</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three bunches of leaves: 2, then 3, then 4.
questions.solution: 2 + 3 + 4 = 9 leaves total.

questions.question_text: Which number completes the pattern: 1, 3, 5, 7, ?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='2'><text x='20' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>1,</text><text x='60' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>3,</text><text x='100' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>5,</text><text x='140' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>7,</text><text x='180' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Odd-number sequence with blank.
questions.solution: The pattern adds 2 each time: 1, 3, 5, 7, 9.

questions.question_text: In the grid, how many shaded squares are there?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='10' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/><rect x='30' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='50' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/><rect x='70' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='90' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/><rect x='10' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='30' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/><rect x='50' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/><rect x='90' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='10' y='50' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/><rect x='30' y='50' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='50' y='50' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/><rect x='70' y='50' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='90' y='50' width='20' height='20' fill='#888'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A 3 by 5 checkerboard with shaded and unshaded squares.
questions.solution: Row 1: 3 shaded, Row 2: 2 shaded, Row 3: 3 shaded. Total = 3 + 2 + 3 = 8.

questions.question_text: A line has 9 children. Tom is 5th from the front. How many children are behind Tom?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='#f0e8ff' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='20' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='55' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='90' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='125' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='160' cy='30' r='12' fill='#c8a8ff'/><text x='152' y='34' font-size='10' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>Tom</text><circle cx='195' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='230' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='265' cy='30' r='12'/><circle cx='300' cy='30' r='12'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Nine children in a line, with Tom highlighted as the 5th.
questions.solution: There are 9 children total. With Tom as 5th, children behind him are 9 - 5 = 4.

questions.question_text: How many dots are on the face of the die shown in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 120 120' stroke='currentColor' fill='#fff' stroke-width='2'><rect x='10' y='10' width='100' height='100' rx='12'/><circle cx='35' cy='35' r='6' fill='#222'/><circle cx='85' cy='35' r='6' fill='#222'/><circle cx='60' cy='60' r='6' fill='#222'/><circle cx='35' cy='85' r='6' fill='#222'/><circle cx='85' cy='85' r='6' fill='#222'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A die face showing a pattern of black dots.
questions.solution: Counting the black dots on the die face gives 5.

questions.question_text: Sara has 4 red flowers and 6 yellow flowers. How many flowers does she have in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 280 70' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='20' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ff8080'/><circle cx='45' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ff8080'/><circle cx='70' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ff8080'/><circle cx='95' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ff8080'/><circle cx='140' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ffe680'/><circle cx='165' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ffe680'/><circle cx='190' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ffe680'/><circle cx='215' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ffe680'/><circle cx='240' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ffe680'/><circle cx='265' cy='35' r='8' fill='#ffe680'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Four red flowers and six yellow flowers.
questions.solution: 4 + 6 = 10 flowers in total.

questions.question_text: Counting backward from 15 by twos, what is the fourth number you say?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='2'><text x='20' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>15,</text><text x='70' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>13,</text><text x='120' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>11,</text><text x='180' y='38' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Backward skip count 15, 13, 11, ?
questions.solution: Counting down by 2: 15, 13, 11, 9. The fourth number is 9.

questions.question_text: Look at the two groups. How many more stars are in Group B than in Group A?
questions.image_description: Group A has 3 stars; Group B has 7 stars.
questions.solution: Group A has 3 and Group B has 7. 7 - 3 = 4 more stars.

questions.question_text: A cake is cut into 8 equal slices. Three slices are eaten. How many slices are left?
questions.image_description: A circular cake divided into 8 slices with 3 slices shaded as eaten.
questions.solution: 8 total slices minus 3 eaten = 5 slices remaining.

questions.question_text: How many small squares (1 by 1) make up the big 4 by 3 rectangle?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' stroke='currentColor' fill='#e8f4ff' stroke-width='2'><rect x='20' y='20' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='50' y='20' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='80' y='20' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='110' y='20' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='20' y='50' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='50' y='50' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='80' y='50' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='110' y='50' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='20' y='80' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='50' y='80' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='80' y='80' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='110' y='80' width='30' height='30'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A 4 column by 3 row grid of unit squares.
questions.solution: 4 columns times 3 rows gives 4 x 3 = 12 unit squares.
